role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The S&P 500 Price Index is a large-cap, market-weighted, U.S. equities index that tracks the price (excluding dividends) of the leading companies that reflect the industries of the U.S. economy and is often considered a proxy for the stock market in general. The fund is non-diversified.
